title: Necessity for appointment.
doc_html:
SECTION 6--OF THE UNDERTUTOR

Art. 273.  Necessity for appointment.

In every tutorship there shall be an undertutor.

Amended by Acts 1960, No. 30, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
